events.title: PhillyDTC Summer Happy Hour
events.venue: Morgan's Pier, 221 N Christopher Columbus Blvd
events.description: Philly ecommerce/DTC community summer happy hour on the water at Morgan's Pier. Network over light bites and drinks. Guest: Samantha Rose (GIR, Endless Commerce, Hologram Capital). 5:00–8:00 PM. Presented by Endless Commerce.

events.title: PHL: Fireside Chat "The Modern Motherhood Reset"
events.description: The Momshift hosts an intimate fireside chat at Kin Boutique about the identity/relationship reset of motherhood and rebuilding support.

events.title: Moth Night at the Schuylkill Center for Environmental Education
events.description: Nocturnal nature appreciation: a bright light set up to attract moths and other nocturnal insects. Meet at the Visitor Center. Bring snacks, chair/blanket, bug spray, headlamp, art supplies/cameras. Hosted by DGS / Skype a Scientist.

events.title: platonic love craft and the nervous system with relational realm therapy
events.description: Led by Madison Wilde, LAMFT: a warm conversation about how we connect, protect, and open up in platonic relationships, and the role of the nervous system in closeness, safety, and vulnerability. Hosted by let me know club.

events.title: fundraiser for get a gato! <3
events.description: Fundraiser for cat cafe/rescue Get A Gato: half the time with the cats, half coloring and small crafts. Two time slots. Bring socks. Hosted by let me know club.

events.title: The Rally Room at Urban Village
events.venue: Urban Village Brewing Company, 1001 N 2nd St
events.description: A meetup for purpose-driven business owners, creatives, and founders focused on real connection over performative networking. Uses Go Deep cards to spark conversation. Northern Liberties.

events.title: Sisterhood Summerween 👻
events.description: Book club for Women of Afro-descent reading horror/thriller by female authors of Color; DIY charmed bookmarks and bookish games. Hosted by Sisterhood Between The Pages.

events.title: Schuylkill Trail Takeover
events.description: BGE Philly HUB's July hike/scavenger hunt takeover of the Schuylkill Trail, 12–3pm. Quick stretch, then walk. Wear comfy clothes, bring water and a blanket.

events.title: Park Craft
events.description: Soul Fly Club transforms a public green space into a temporary open studio; all ages/skill levels, no experience required. Bring a project or use provided materials.
